texto: The passion for art is, as for believers, very religious. It unites people, its message is of common humanity. Art has become my religion - others pray in church. It's a banality, but you don't possess art, it possesses you. It's like falling in love.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Francois Pinault: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “The passion for art is, as for believers, very religious. It unites people, its message is of com…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, love, art pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de art e passion.

frase_original: The passion for art is, as for believers, very religious. It unites people, its message is of common humanity. Art has become my religion - others pray in church. It's a banality, but you don't possess art, it possesses you. It's like falling in love.
